PreToolUse.description: Block edits to gateway/application.yml that introduce duplicate root-level YAML keys (causes DuplicateKeyException startup crash).
PreToolUse.windows: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$input = $null; $lines = @(); while (($line = [Console]::In.ReadLine()) -ne $null) { $lines += $line }; $payload = $lines -join \"`n\"; $obj = $payload | ConvertFrom-Json; $file = $obj.tool_input.path ?? $obj.tool_input.filePath ?? $obj.tool_input.file_path; if (-not $file) { exit 0 }; if (-not (Test-Path $file)) { exit 0 }; $content = Get-Content $file -Raw; $rootKeys = @(); foreach ($line in ($content -split \"`n\")) { if ($line -match '^([a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_-]*)\s*:') { $rootKeys += $Matches[1] } }; $dupes = $rootKeys | Group-Object | Where-Object { $_.Count -gt 1 } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; if ($dupes.Count -gt 0) { $msg = @{ hookSpecificOutput = @{ hookEventName = 'PreToolUse'; permissionDecision = 'ask'; permissionDecisionReason = (\"gateway/application.yml has duplicate root key(s): \" + ($dupes -join ', ') + \". This causes DuplicateKeyException at startup. Fix before proceeding.\") } } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; Write-Output $msg; exit 0 } else { exit 0 }"
PreToolUse.linux:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
payload = json.load(sys.stdin)
file = (payload.get('tool_input') or {}).get('path') or (payload.get('tool_input') or {}).get('filePath') or (payload.get('tool_input') or {}).get('file_path')
if not file:
    sys.exit(0)
try:
    lines = open(file).readlines()
except FileNotFoundError:
    sys.exit(0)
import re
root_keys = [re.match(r'^([a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_-]*)\s*:', l).group(1) for l in lines if re.match(r'^([a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_-]*)\s*:', l)]
dupes = [k for k in set(root_keys) if root_keys.count(k) > 1]
if dupes:
    out = {'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PreToolUse', 'permissionDecision': 'ask', 'permissionDecisionReason': 'gateway/application.yml has duplicate root key(s): ' + ', '.join(dupes) + '. This causes DuplicateKeyException at startup. Fix before proceeding.'}}
    print(json.dumps(out))
sys.exit(0)
"

PostToolUse.description: After any write to gateway/application.yml, verify no duplicate root-level YAML keys were introduced.
PostToolUse.windows: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$file = 'backend/gateway/src/main/resources/application.yml'; if (-not (Test-Path $file)) { exit 0 }; $rootKeys = @(); foreach ($line in (Get-Content $file)) { if ($line -match '^([a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_-]*)\s*:') { $rootKeys += $Matches[1] } }; $dupes = $rootKeys | Group-Object | Where-Object { $_.Count -gt 1 } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; if ($dupes.Count -gt 0) { $msg = @{ decision = 'block'; reason = (\"BLOCKED: gateway/application.yml now has duplicate root key(s): \" + ($dupes -join ', ') + \". Revert or merge the duplicate blocks before deploying.\") } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; Write-Output $msg; exit 2 }; Write-Host '[validate-gateway-yaml] OK — no duplicate root keys'; exit 0"
PostToolUse.linux:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
file = 'backend/gateway/src/main/resources/application.yml'
try:
    lines = open(file).readlines()
except FileNotFoundError:
    sys.exit(0)
import re
root_keys = [re.match(r'^([a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_-]*)\s*:', l).group(1) for l in lines if re.match(r'^([a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_-]*)\s*:', l)]
dupes = [k for k in set(root_keys) if root_keys.count(k) > 1]
if dupes:
    print(json.dumps({'decision': 'block', 'reason': 'BLOCKED: gateway/application.yml now has duplicate root key(s): ' + ', '.join(dupes) + '. Revert or merge the duplicate blocks before deploying.'}))
    sys.exit(2)
print('[validate-gateway-yaml] OK - no duplicate root keys')
sys.exit(0)
"
